company.name_jp: 株式会社アローシステムズ

research_notes: Found executive information on company overview page. Executives include President & Representative Director 吉田 康宏, Managing Director 小島 努, Director 中野 博美, and Auditor 金城 敦. Company established in 2001 with 36 employees as of December 2025. Sales of 5.02 billion yen (2025 fiscal year). All information sourced from official company website.
